warnings: Could not resolve 'trp-page' to a SMILES from any reliable source. Tried: PubChem, OPSIN, NIST WebBook. Check the spelling, supply a SMILES string directly, or provide an .xyz file.

prose:
Unable to build a 3-D structure.

The build-from-smiles skill tried to resolve the name “trp-page” to a canonical SMILES using PubChem, OPSIN, and the NIST WebBook, but no matches were found, so no coordinates could be generated.

Please double-check the molecule’s name or provide a specific identifier (e.g., an exact SMILES string, InChI, or an existing .xyz file), and I can re-run the build tool immediately.
